title: rhamnus cornifolia var. cornifolia
intro: Rhamnus cornifolia var. cornifolia, also known as Chinese buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Chinese buckthorn include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Chinese buckthorn is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
